jumbotronLead: Connecting IT startups in Latin America with the right professionals.
expertiseContent: Our expertise spans connecting you with top-notch professionals in multiple roles, including Product Owners, UI/UX Designers, Fullstack Developers, and Data Scientists. We comprehend the unique aspects of each position to meet your tailored needs.
marketContent: We have a strong network in the lively tech hubs of Latin America, where the rising tide of tech talent and booming ecosystems unlock exceptional opportunities.
challengesIntro1: In the digital age, your company's growth is directly tied to the caliber of your tech team...
challengesIntro2: But finding and hiring these key players has become increasingly complex.
shinesIntro: We're not just recruiters, we're your strategic partners in assembling the tech dream team that will propel your business forward.
processDescription: Our agency drives IT success through a strategic recruitment process: from custom planning and top-tier sourcing to precise selection and seamless onboarding.
strategyDescription: Align recruitment processes to specific needs. Guide based on Latin America market insights.
sourceDescription: Use top technology to access the full reachable market. Present the first candidates in 3 days. Premium time to fill: 1 - 3 weeks.
selectDescription: Find best fits through technical, soft skills, and cultural fit assessments. Verify with relevant background checks: criminal record, ID number, employment and education verifications.
hireDescription: Support job offer negotiation, onboarding smooth transition, and follow-up with managers and candidates.
teamValue1: Industry Insiders: We deeply understand the ever-evolving tech landscape and its talent needs.
teamValue2: Recruiting Experts: All our team members are certified recruiters and bring decades of IT recruiting experience to the table.
teamValue3: Engaged Advisors: We're dedicated to delivering exceptional service and tailored solutions.
valuesQuality: Quality: Commitment to delivering the highest standards in every aspect of our service.
valuesCollaboration: Collaboration: Fostering teamwork and partnership, we believe in achieving more together.
valuesTransparency: Transparency: Maintaining open and honest communication, building trust every step of the way.
valuesPassion: Passion: Our drive comes from a genuine love for helping companies grow and talents succeed in their careers.
reasonsExpert: Expert Advisors: Receive guidance from our seasoned consultants who understand IT and talent hubs in Latin America.
reasonsProcess: Fast & Transparent process: Streamlined process to help you quickly find the right IT professionals for your team. 3 days for first candidates, access to status reports at any time.
reasonsTailored: Tailored Recruitment: We customize our recruitment approach to match your specific needs.
reasonsBudget: Budget-friendly: Amazing value-price ratio! And pay until offer acceptance.
reasonsMarket: Full Searchable Market: We use cutting-edge technology which provides us unparalleled access to a diverse and expansive profile market.
reasonsGuarantee: Guaranteed results: All our plans include 3-months guarantee.
plansContent: Choose from our flexible plans designed to provide maximum value and meet your business needs.
customPlanContent: We can create the perfect fit solution for your needs. Let’s talk!
planNotes: ✓ All our plans include 3-months guarantee ✓ Pay until offer acceptance
hiringFeatures: Hire in 150+ countries. We cover your needs: Full-time employees, Temporary contractors, Contract to hire.
hiringBenefits: All-in-One HR and Payroll management: Contract management, Multi-country payroll, Benefits and insurance, Employee expense management, Employee leave management, Onboarding assistance – Laptops and IT assets, Salary calculator, Local talent references and labor regulations, Offer guides, Dedicated service and support.
contactContent: Our team is ready to assist you. Feel free to reach out to us for any inquiries or collaboration opportunities.
faq1: How does your IT recruitment agency find candidates?
faq1Answer: We utilize a combination of advanced recruitment methods, networking, and top technology tools to source and attract top IT talent.
faq2: What types of IT positions do you recruit for?
faq2Answer: We recruit for a wide range of IT positions, including software developers, network engineers, cybersecurity specialists, project managers, and more.
faq3: How long does the recruitment process typically take?
faq3Answer: It takes 1 to 3 weeks, and you will receive the first candidates in 3 days! This can vary depending on the specific requirements of the position and the availability of suitable candidates. We strive to provide efficient and timely recruitment services.
faq4: Do you offer any guarantees on the candidates you place?
faq4Answer: Yes, we offer a 3-months guarantee period for the candidates we place to ensure client satisfaction. If the candidate does not meet expectations within the specified period, we will work to find a suitable replacement.
faq5: How can I get started with your IT recruitment agency?
faq5Answer: To get started, simply contact us through our website or give us a call. Our team will be happy to discuss your recruitment needs and provide a customized solution for your organization.
